---
name: Knowledge Base Contribution
about: Propose or submit a new domain knowledge base (YAML)
title: "[KB] "
labels: community, documentation
---

## Domain

Name of the skill domain (e.g., "Frontend Engineering", "Machine Learning").

## Skills Covered

Which skills from the taxonomy does this domain map to? See `backend/app/data/skills_taxonomy.py`.

- skill-id-1
- skill-id-2

## Concepts Overview

Brief description of the concepts covered at each level:

- **Junior**: [e.g., basic HTML/CSS, DOM manipulation]
- **Mid**: [e.g., component architecture, state management]
- **Senior**: [e.g., performance optimization, accessibility]
- **Staff**: [e.g., design systems, micro-frontend architecture]

## YAML File

Attach or paste your YAML file following the schema in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#yaml-schema).

## Rationale

Why is this domain important? What audience does it serve?
